name: How do I prove my back injury came from lifting heavy boxes in the warehouse and not just from getting older?
description: Proof comes from medical records and specific incident reports. You need a doctor to link your back pain to your warehouse duties, whether it was one heavy lift

mainEntity.name: How do I prove my back injury came from lifting heavy boxes in the warehouse and not just from getting older?

acceptedAnswer.text: Proof comes from medical records and specific incident reports. You need a doctor to link your back pain to your warehouse duties, whether it was one heavy lift or years of repetitive strain. Prompt reporting is essential.
